positive: A maximalist, highly detailed pattern repeating an abstract geometric labyrinth motif in Art Deco style. The pattern features clean, stylized mandalas, interlocking chevron patterns, and exaggerated sunburst floral elements. Dominant color palette is deep midnight indigo, burnished gold, rich emerald green, and creamy off-white. The design must be highly symmetrical, creating a strong visual flow suitable for tiling on fabric. Composition should be centered and balanced, focusing on clean, strong silhouettes and high contrast against a seamless background. Vector illustration quality, ultra-detailed pattern, perfect repetition, luxurious, elegant, bold.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, low quality, watermark, logo, signature, poor composition, cropped, messy, noise, smudge, extra limbs, bad anatomy
